title: Message Part
description: Standalone typed message segment with markdown, code blocks, tool activity, thinking states, errors, and optional streaming.

props.name: content
props.description: Plain text, code, or error content

props.name: toolName
props.description: Tool or function name for tool parts

props.name: toolArguments
props.description: Serialized tool input for tool-call parts

props.name: completed
props.description: Mark a thinking state as completed

props.name: language
props.description: Code language hint for code-block parts

props.name: filename
props.description: Filename shown in the code block header

props.name: connection
props.description: Connected-card position when composing parts manually

props.name: onStreamEnd
props.description: Called after the final sanitizing render pass completes

notes: Message Part can now be used directly for text, code blocks, tool calls, tool results, thinking, and errors.
Standalone Message Part uses camelCase props like toolName, toolStatus, and thinkingLabel.
Start with the /docs/messages guide before using Message Part directly in a larger conversation layout.
Supports streaming markdown rendering via ref methods (startStream, appendTokens, endStream).
Use it as the in-flight surface for streaming or for a single standalone segment, not as a replacement for an entire grouped assistant turn.
Use Message Group when one assistant turn contains several connected parts; use Message Part when one segment should stand alone.
